title: Add a logo to a template
excerpt: Is it possible to add a logo to either right or left side in a template and above all text? I only managed to add a logo under heading (in a meeting note). Neither possible to change size of the cover image.

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add a logo to either right or left side in a template and above all text? I only managed to add a logo under heading (in a meeting note). Neither possible to change size of the cover image.
